howItWorks.intro: This gaming pc bottleneck calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Bottleneck analysis considers CPU tier, GPU tier, and resolution
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: How do I know if my PC is bottlenecked?
faq.answer: If GPU usage is below 90% while gaming, your CPU is likely the bottleneck. At higher resolutions (4K), the GPU becomes more important; at 1080p, CPU matters more.

howWeCalculate.intro: This gaming pc bottleneck calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs
Results are calculated instantly in your browser — nothing is sent to a server
Review the detailed breakdown to understand how each factor affects your result
